seoTitle: Buckingham vs Buckleboo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Buckingham and Buckleboo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Buckingham and Buckleboo.
heading: Buckingham vs Buckleboo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Buckingham, South Australia and Buckleboo, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Buckleboo has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Buckingham (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Buckingham or Buckleboo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Buckingham has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Buckleboo scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Buckingham scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Buckleboo scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Buckingham or Buckleboo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Buckleboo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
